# MegaHUD

> Real-time opponent intelligence for Poker Now.

MegaHUD is a Chrome extension that provides a professional-grade heads-up display (HUD) overlay for pokernow.com and pokernow.club. It tracks live poker statistics, rates opponent exploitability, and automates preflop folding decisions.

## Product

- Chrome Extension (Manifest V3)
- Works on pokernow.com and pokernow.club
- Supports NLH, PLO4, PLO5, and PLO Hi/Lo
- Free tier + Pro tier ($24.99/month, 7-day free trial)

## Free Features

- VPIP%, PFR%, 3-Bet% live stats
- Average Lead and Average Raise sizing
- Stealth Mode toggle (Shift+H) to hide overlays
- Ledger view (Shift+L)
- HUD position customization
- Local IndexedDB storage
- Dynamic context-aware reminders

## Pro Features

- Cloud sync across 2 devices via Google OAuth
- Advanced stats: C-Bet%, Fold to C-Bet%, Check-Raise%, Aggression Factor (AF), WTSD%
- 30-hand quality gate before displaying stats
- Auto-Fold Engine with 13x13 hand matrix and position-based ranges (Shift+F to toggle)
- Exploitability Rating: AI-powered 1-10 leak scoring based on 8 weighted factors
- Lifetime Ledger with cloud-synced deduplication
- Showdown Profiler: tags hands as Air, Thin Value, Thick Value, or Nuts; tracks Value-to-Bluff ratio
- Audio alerts for premium hands (AA/KK/QQ/AKs), big pot rumble, and squeeze detection (works when tab is muted)
- Merged Table Stats
- Board Connection Odds
- Positional stat breakdowns
- Priority support

## Installation

MegaHUD is loaded as an unpacked Chrome extension:

1. Download the .zip file
2. Extract to a local folder
3. Open chrome://extensions
4. Enable Developer Mode
5. Click "Load unpacked" and select the extracted folder
6. Click the MegaHUD icon in the toolbar to configure
7. Visit any Poker Now table — the HUD activates automatically

## Contact

- Email: support@megahud.com
